title: castilleja crista-galli
intro: Castilleja crista-galli, also known as Painted Cup or Indian Paintbrush, is a unique, hemiparasitic plant native to North America. The medicinal properties of Castilleja crista-galli include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Its health benefits include alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing fever. Castilleja crista-galli can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
